parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Misskey destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise misskeys:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose the Misskey API URL from your stored secrets and POST a native Misskey {i, text} payload directly to api/notes/create, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"i":"${ customer_secrets.MISSKEY_TOKEN }","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"visibility":"public"}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Misskey destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Misskey instance (no Apprise)

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Misskey host

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Misskey token
